name: Beaumont Inn Smoked Sausage & Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook mushrooms at 350°F for 7 minutes.
2. Allow the mushrooms to cool.
3. Mix cooled sausage, cream cheese, and Parmesan cheese in a bowl.
4. Fill each mushroom with about 1 teaspoon of the mixture.
5. Bake at 350°F for an additional 7 minutes.
